title: Dating Horror Stories
overview: In Dating Horror Stories, a darkly comedic horror anthology, the treacherous world of modern dating is explored through three twisted tales of new relationships gone horrifyingly wrong. Each story delves into the bizarre and macabre, showing that dating can be more than just awkward-it can be deadly.
